seducer_types.name: The Siren
seducer_types.essence: Pure sensory overload. Fantasy made flesh. Promise of adventure and escape.
seducer_types.when: Target is bored, trapped in routine, craving intensity

seducer_types.name: The Rake
seducer_types.essence: Relentless pursuit. Single-minded devotion that overwhelms resistance.
seducer_types.when: Target doubts their desirability, wants to feel chosen

seducer_types.name: The Ideal Lover
seducer_types.essence: Mirror their fantasies back. Become what they secretly want.
seducer_types.when: Target has unfulfilled romantic ideals, gaps in their life

seducer_types.name: The Dandy
seducer_types.essence: Ambiguity and androgyny. Defy categories. Intrigue through mystery.
seducer_types.when: Target bored by predictable types, drawn to the unconventional

seducer_types.name: The Natural
seducer_types.essence: Childlike spontaneity. Disarm with apparent innocence and authenticity.
seducer_types.when: Target suspicious of sophistication, nostalgic, guarded

seducer_types.name: The Coquette
seducer_types.essence: Hot and cold. Give then withdraw. Create addictive uncertainty.
seducer_types.when: Target too confident, needs to be destabilized, thrives on challenge

seducer_types.name: The Charmer
seducer_types.essence: Make them feel like the center of the universe. Pure attention.
seducer_types.when: Target insecure, wants validation, needs to feel special

seducer_types.name: The Charismatic
seducer_types.essence: Absolute conviction. Your certainty becomes their faith.
seducer_types.when: Target needs direction, lost, seeking meaning or leadership

seducer_types.name: The Star
seducer_types.essence: Theatrical distance. Larger than life. They project their dreams onto you.
seducer_types.when: Target needs an idol, wants to worship, seeks the extraordinary

steps.name: Choose the Right Victim
steps.essence: Target the dissatisfied, the bored, those with gaps to fill.

steps.name: Create a False Sense of Security
steps.essence: Approach indirectly. Be friend first, let guard drop.

steps.name: Send Mixed Signals
steps.essence: Confuse with contradictions. Mystery creates obsession.

steps.name: Appear to Be an Object of Desire
steps.essence: Create triangles. Others wanting you makes you more valuable.

steps.name: Create a Need — Stir Anxiety and Discontent
steps.essence: Make them aware of what they're missing before you offer it.

steps.name: Master the Art of Insinuation
steps.essence: Plant ideas without stating them. Let them think it was theirs.

steps.name: Enter Their Spirit
steps.essence: Mirror their moods, values, desires. Become their reflection.

steps.name: Create Temptation
steps.essence: Dangle what they want. Keep it just out of reach.

phases.phase: II: Lead Astray — Creating Pleasure and Confusion

steps.name: Keep Them in Suspense
steps.essence: Unpredictability is addictive. Never let them know what's next.

steps.name: Use the Demonic Power of Words
steps.essence: Speak to their unconscious. Flattery, promises, possibility.

steps.name: Pay Attention to Detail
steps.essence: Small thoughtful gestures outweigh grand ones. Notice everything.

steps.name: Poeticize Your Presence
steps.essence: Create memorable moments. Orchestrate experiences they won't forget.

steps.name: Disarm with Strategic Weakness
steps.essence: Show vulnerability. Perfection is suspicious. Weakness creates intimacy.

steps.name: Confuse Desire and Reality
steps.essence: Blur fantasy and real. Make them unsure where one ends and other begins.

steps.name: Isolate the Victim
steps.essence: Cut ties to their support. You become their whole world.

phases.phase: III: The Precipice — Deepening the Effect

steps.name: Prove Yourself
steps.essence: Sacrifice something for them. Action over words. Blood over ink.

steps.name: Effect a Regression
steps.essence: Trigger childhood emotions. Parent/child dynamics run deep.

steps.name: Stir Up the Transgressive
steps.essence: Forbidden fruit. Taboo creates irresistible pull.

steps.name: Use Spiritual Lures
steps.essence: Elevate beyond physical. Meaning, purpose, transcendence.

steps.name: Mix Pleasure with Pain
steps.essence: Sweet and bitter. Pleasure without pain becomes boring.

phases.phase: IV: Moving In for the Kill

steps.name: Give Them Space to Fall
steps.essence: Strategic withdrawal. Absence makes obsession grow.

steps.name: Use Physical Lures
steps.essence: Build physical tension. Proximity, touch, anticipation.

steps.name: Master the Art of the Bold Move
steps.essence: Timidity is fatal. When the moment comes, act decisively.

steps.name: Beware the Aftereffects
steps.essence: Post-conquest is dangerous. Either commit or exit cleanly.
